title: Crispy Mediterranean Tomato Flatbread
description: A kid-friendly, high‑protein flatbread that’s crispy, tangy, and packed with Mediterranean flavors.
instructions: Brush each pita with olive oil, then place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Toss diced tomatoes, sliced onion, minced garlic, oregano, paprika, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Spread the mixture evenly over the oiled pitas.
Drizzle balsamic vinegar over the toppings, then bake for 10 minutes until the edges are crisp and the tomatoes are tender.
Remove from oven and sprinkle chopped basil and crumbled feta over the warm flatbreads.
Let cool for a minute, then cut into wedges and serve immediately.
For extra crispiness, place the flatbreads in a preheated skillet for 1–2 minutes per side before serving.
Optional: Offer a side of Greek yogurt or tzatziki as a dipping sauce.
Enjoy the crunchy, savory bite that even kids love!
